dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back, here is what is happening today.
dashboard.superAdminDesc: Welcome to the Super Admin control center.

form.title: Create New Admin
form.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

topicManagement.title: Topic & Field Management
topicManagement.desc: Create and organize topics with their fields.

systemConfig.title: Learning Configuration
systemConfig.removedDesc: Domain, Knowledge, Scheme, and Level have been removed. Users configure directly via document description, level, and goals in Workspace.
systemConfig.description: Create and maintain domains, knowledge, schemes, and levels used across the platform.
systemConfig.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, description, or status...
systemConfig.readDeniedDescription: Your account does not currently have permission to view learning configuration.

panels.knowledge: Knowledge items belong to a domain and define the base level system.
panels.scheme: Schemes belong to a knowledge item and can refine its evaluation model.
panels.level: Levels belong to a scheme or directly to a knowledge item.

placeholders.description: Add extra context or usage notes...

levelHints.selectParent: Choose a knowledge first to see which level model applies.
levelHints.scoreBased: SCORE_BASED: Enter each score (e.g. 5.0) and press Enter to add to the list.
levelHints.threeLevel: THREE_LEVEL: Levels are auto-created (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced). Edit if needed.

wizard.title: Create step by step
wizard.description: Follow Domain → Knowledge → Scheme → Level for logical flow.
wizard.step1Desc: Create a new domain or select an existing one.
wizard.step2Desc: Select domain and create knowledge. Level system type chosen here applies to scheme and level.
wizard.step3Desc: Scheme is optional. LevelSystemType is inherited from Knowledge and cannot be changed.
wizard.step4Desc: SCORE_BASED: enter scores. THREE_LEVEL: 3 default levels or custom 4-5 levels.
wizard.step1CreateOrSelect: Create a new domain or select an existing one.
wizard.levelSystemTypeHint: Scheme will inherit this type. To change, go back to step 2.
wizard.skipScheme: Skip Scheme (Level belongs directly to Knowledge)
wizard.customLevelNamesRequired: Please enter names for all levels.
wizard.scoreListHint: Enter each score (e.g. 5.0) and press Enter to add to the list.

dialogs.createDescription: Fill in the required fields to add a new item.
dialogs.editDescription: Update the item details and save your changes.
dialogs.deleteDescriptionDomainCascade: Deleting Domain {{name}} will permanently remove the Domain and all Knowledge, Scheme, and Level inside it. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?

plan.title: Your Plan
plan.subtitle: Plans can be purchased permanently. AI features consume Credits from your wallet.

creditModel.title: Credit model for AI
creditModel.desc: Own your plan permanently. Each AI action consumes Credits. When you run out, just top up to continue.

plan.noPlans: No plans available for this category.
plan.loadError: Unable to load plans. Please try again.

notes.permanentDesc: Plans are not necessarily monthly. Some plans can be sold as permanent depending on system configuration.
notes.creditsDesc: AI features (quiz/flashcards/mock tests/companion...) consume Credits based on usage.
notes.refundDesc: Payments are secured. You can review your Credit purchase history in the wallet.

wallet.title: Quizmate Credits
wallet.subtitle: Check balance, buy more Credits, and view your transaction history.
wallet.hint: Credits are used for AI-powered features in QuizMate.
wallet.buySubtitle: Pick a package to keep using AI features.

rbac.title: RBAC System
rbac.desc: Manage system roles and permissions - Role Based Access Control.
rbac.userRoleDesc: Shows only ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN accounts.

subscription.title: Subscription Management
subscription.desc: Manage subscription plans and user subscriptions.
subscription.addPlanDesc: Create a new subscription plan with pricing and features.
subscription.planDetailDesc: Detailed information about this subscription plan.
subscription.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the plan "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
subscription.planInUse: This plan has at least 1 user using it
subscription.defaultPlanExists: A default plan already exists for {{type}}. Only 1 INDIVIDUAL default and 1 GROUP default plan are allowed.

auth.loginSubtitle: Login to access your QuizMate account
auth.signUpSubtitle: Let's get you all set up so you can access your personal account.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Don't worry, happens to all of us. Enter your email below to recover your password
auth.enterOTPSubtitle: Enter the OTP code sent to your email
auth.otpSent: OTP code has been sent to your email
auth.loginGoogleFailed: Google login failed. Please try again.
auth.registerOtpSent: An OTP code has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox.
auth.registerOtpSubtitle: Enter the OTP code sent to your email to complete registration

validation.usernameLength: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters
validation.usernameFormat: Username must contain both letters and numbers, allowed characters: . _ @ -
validation.passwordLength: Password must be more than 8 characters
validation.passwordFormat: Password must contain both letters and numbers

hero.subtitle: Upload your study materials (PDFs, Videos, or URLs) and let our AI build personalized roadmaps and interactive quizzes.

features.title: Revolutionize Your Learning Journey
features.roadmapDesc: Our AI analyzes your materials and generates a step-by-step learning path from basics to advanced.
features.quizDesc: Generate multiple-choice or essay questions instantly from any PDF, YouTube video, or website link.
features.companionDesc: Interact with your AI tutor via voice to clear doubts and explain complex concepts in real-time.

testimonials.title: What our students are saying 😍
testimonials.student1Quote: "QuizMate AI completely changed how I prepare for my exams. Generating quizzes from lecture videos is a game changer!"
testimonials.student2Quote: "The AI Roadmap is incredible. It broke down my 200-page textbook into 10 logical learning phases. Highly recommend!"

footer.brandDesc: Empowering students worldwide with AI-driven study tools for a smarter future.
footer.copyright: © 2026 QuizMate AI. Built with intelligence for learners.

navigator.title: Question Navigator
navigator.lastUnlocked: Must keep at least 1 unlocked question for auto-balancing

strategyDesc.balanced: Standard weight ratio between difficulty levels. Suitable for most quizzes.
strategyDesc.linear: Evenly increasing weight. Higher difficulty questions receive proportionally more points.
strategyDesc.elite: Strongly rewards hard questions. Ideal for advanced or competitive assessments.
strategyDesc.tight: Nearly equal weight across all levels. Best for knowledge-check quizzes.
